testcase.name: testJava25DeprecatedZoneId(String)[1]
testcase.system-err: WARNING: Use of the three-letter time zone ID "ACT" is deprecated and it will be removed in a future release

testcase.name: testJava25DeprecatedZoneId(String)[2]
testcase.system-err: WARNING: Use of the three-letter time zone ID "CST" is deprecated and it will be removed in a future release
